name: Acid Potion
description: Drop on an enemy to deal 30 (+60 per boss fight victory) damage to it.

name: Basilisk's Eye
description: Drop on a non-boss enemy to instantly kill all non-boss enemies.

name: Berserk Potion
description: Drop on your character to gain 10 (+20 per boss fight victory) Rage.

name: Crystallized Soul
description: Drop on your character to gain Invulnerable and 30 Rage.

name: Debilitating Potion
description: Drop on an enemy to apply 10 Weakness to it.

name: Healing Potion
description: Drop on your character to restore 30% of your Max Health.

name: Paralyzing Potion
description: Drop on an enemy to stun it.

name: Philosopher's Stone
description: Drop on your character to restore all your health and remove all negative Statuses.

name: Protection Potion
description: Drop on your character to gain 1 Barrier.

name: Purifying Potion
description: Drop on your character to remove all stacks from a random negative Status.

name: Sickening Potion
description: Drop on an enemy to apply 10 Wound to it.

name: Stoneskin Potion
description: Drop on your character to gain 10 (+20 per boss fight victory) armor.

name: Toxic Potion
description: Drop on an enemy to apply 10 (+20 per boss fight victory) Poison to it.
